objectives: Navigate and manage files and directories in Linux/Unix
Use core command-line tools to inspect and manipulate data files
Understand permissions and environment basics needed for data workflows
learning_path.title: Linux/Unix Foundations for Data Work

objectives: Explain core concepts of database management systems
Perform basic database operations and understand transactional behavior
Compare common database system characteristics and use cases
learning_path.title: Database Systems Fundamentals and Operations

objectives: Create and manage schemas and tables in Postgresql/Mysql
Apply indexing and constraints to improve data integrity and performance
Run administrative and maintenance tasks relevant to analytics workloads
learning_path.title: Relational Databases with Postgresql/Mysql

objectives: Write queries to filter, join, aggregate, and transform data
Use SQL to validate data quality and reconcile datasets
Design queries that are efficient and maintainable
learning_path.title: SQL for Analytics and Data Engineering

objectives: Use Python to read, transform, and write datasets
Implement reusable functions for data preparation tasks
Perform basic validation checks and structured outputs for downstream systems
learning_path.title: Python for Data Processing

objectives: Combine SQL and Python to explore and summarize datasets
Create repeatable analysis steps that can be operationalized
Identify data issues and propose corrective transformations
learning_path.title: Data Analysis with SQL and Python

objectives: Design conceptual and logical models aligned to business questions
Translate requirements into normalized and analytics-friendly structures
Define keys, relationships, and grain to support reliable reporting
learning_path.title: Data Modeling for Analytics

objectives: Explain core data warehouse concepts and common architectural patterns
Define dimensions, facts, and grain for analytical use cases
Plan data organization to support performance and consistency
learning_path.title: Data Warehouse Concepts and Structures

objectives: Implement dimensional structures and loading approaches
Apply strategies for incremental loads and historical tracking
Validate warehouse data correctness and consistency across layers
learning_path.title: Implement Data Warehousing Techniques

objectives: Design end-to-end ETL/ELT flows from source to target
Implement extraction, transformation, and loading patterns
Add checks for data quality, idempotency, and recoverability
learning_path.title: ETL/ELT Pipeline Development

objectives: Model pipelines as scheduled workflows and manage dependencies
Implement retries, backfills, and parameterized runs
Monitor and troubleshoot workflow executions
learning_path.title: Workflow Orchestration with Airflow

objectives: Map data pipeline components to common cloud platform services
Plan secure and reliable data movement and storage in the cloud
Estimate operational considerations for running pipelines in cloud environments
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms for Data Engineering (Aws/Azure/Gcp)

objectives: Explain core distributed systems concepts relevant to data platforms
Understand tradeoffs in reliability, consistency, and scalability
Identify failure modes and design considerations for distributed data workloads
learning_path.title: Distributed Systems Fundamentals for Data Processing

objectives: Build scalable batch transformations using Apache Spark
Optimize Spark jobs through partitioning and execution planning awareness
Integrate Spark outputs with downstream analytical storage
learning_path.title: Apache Spark for Batch Data Processing

objectives: Explain Kafka concepts and how streaming data flows through systems
Design streaming ingestion patterns and topic strategies
Validate and reason about streaming data correctness and delivery behavior
learning_path.title: Stream Processing with Kafka

matched_occupation.description: Data engineers develop the architecture needed to process, manage, and store large amounts of data which will be used by data scientists for analysis. They design the infrastructure and maintain data pipelines and warehouses to leverage data for strategic advantage.
matched_occupation.label: data engineer
